text: No ramp at Chatram Bus Stand platform 3. I use a wheelchair and had to be lifted by strangers to board the bus. This is humiliating and unsafe.
Srirangam Bus Stand has absolutely no accessibility features. No ramp, no tactile path, nothing. Disabled people are completely ignored here.
There is no audio announcement system at Chatram Bus Stand. As a visually impaired person, I cannot identify which bus has arrived.
Thillai Nagar bus stop has no ramp, no shelter, and no seating for elderly or disabled passengers. We stand in the sun for 30 minutes.
The bus stop near Cantonment area has steps but no ramp. My father uses a walking stick and almost fell trying to climb the steps.
KK Nagar bus stop is completely inaccessible. No ramp, no tactile guidance, no audio. How are blind people supposed to use public transport?
I am deaf and there is no LED display board at Srirangam bus stand showing bus numbers and routes. Only verbal announcements which I cannot hear.
Mannarpuram bus stop has broken pavement. My wheelchair gets stuck in the gaps. The entire area around the stop is not wheelchair friendly.
Teppakulam bus stop has no braille signage at all. I am visually impaired and cannot read the route information board.
The accessible toilet at Chatram Bus Stand is always locked. Staff says they don't have the key. This has been the case for over 6 months.
No wheelchair space on buses departing from Thillai Nagar. The buses are old models with narrow doors. Impossible for wheelchair users.
Ariyamangalam bus stop is dangerous for disabled people. No ramp, uneven ground, no lighting at night, no staff to help.
Woraiyur bus stop has a ramp but it is too steep. My wheelchair tips backward when I try to go up. The ramp does not follow the 1:12 slope standard.
There are no audio signals at Karumandapam bus stop intersection. Blind people cannot safely cross the road to reach the bus stop.
Thiruverumbur bus stand has a ramp at the entrance but no tactile path inside. Visually impaired passengers get lost inside the terminal.
Bikshandarkoil bus stop is just a pole with a signboard. No shelter, no seating, no ramp, nothing for disabled passengers. Worst stop in Trichy.
Staff at Chatram Bus Stand refused to help me board the bus with my wheelchair. They said it's not their job. Very rude and unhelpful.
Thuvakudi bus stop near NIT campus has no accessibility at all. Many disabled students struggle daily to catch the bus.
Palakkarai bus stop ramp is broken â€” the concrete has crumbled on one side. It's been like this for a year with no repairs.
Crawford bus stop has no audio announcements. Bus drivers don't announce their route number. Blind passengers miss their buses regularly.
Trichy Junction has elevators but they are frequently out of order. Last week both lifts on platform 1 were broken for 3 days.
No wheelchair ramp at Srirangam bus stand. I visited the famous temple but couldn't take the bus back. Had to pay for an auto.
Teppakulam bus stop has no shelter or seating. My grandmother who uses a walker has to stand in the rain waiting for the bus.
Khajamalai bus stop has no accessible features whatsoever. There are two steps to climb and no ramp. Wheelchair users cannot use this stop.
My son is autistic and gets overwhelmed by the chaos at KK Nagar bus stop. There is no quiet waiting area or any sensory-friendly features.
Ponmalai Golden Rock station has a ramp but no braille signage on platforms. Visually impaired passengers cannot navigate independently.
Puthur bus stop has no audio signal at the nearby pedestrian crossing. I am blind and crossing the road here is very dangerous.
Lalgudi bus stand toilet has no grab bars or wheelchair access. Disabled passengers have to use the regular toilet which is very difficult.
TV Kovil bus stop has no bus shelter. Disabled passengers are exposed to extreme heat in summer. No seating available at all.
MGR Bus Stand has a ramp but it is blocked by parked two-wheelers. Staff doesn't clear the area. Ramp is useless if blocked.
No braille signage at Thillai Nagar bus stop. The route map is only in Tamil text which visually impaired people cannot read.
The footpath leading to Mannarpuram bus stop has open drainage. My wheelchair almost fell into it. This is life-threatening.
Cantonment bus stop near the army area has no tactile path. Blind passengers have no guidance to find the boarding point.
Anna Nagar bus stop is on a very narrow road. No wheelchair-accessible path from the main road to the stop. Completely inaccessible.
Senthaneerpuram bus stop has no staff, no shelter, no ramp, no audio. It's like the city planners forgot disabled people exist.
Fort Station bus stop ramp is there but too narrow for electric wheelchairs. Standard wheelchair barely fits. Need wider ramp urgently.
The elevator at Chatram Bus Stand ground floor doesn't work. It hasn't worked since March. Wheelchair users cannot go to the first floor.
Samayapuram bus stop is near the famous temple but has no braille signage. Many visually impaired devotees visit and struggle with directions.
Chinthamani bus stop has no audio warning when buses arrive. I am partially blind and was almost hit by a bus pulling into the stop.
Karumandapam bus stop has no accessible toilet nearby. The nearest public toilet is 500 meters away and also not wheelchair accessible.
Driver of bus 1A from Srirangam refused to lower the bus for my elderly mother. Said the hydraulic system doesn't work. No low-floor buses on this route.
Thiruverumbur bus stand accessible toilet is extremely dirty. Staff says cleaning happens only once a day. Not hygienic for disabled users.
Manapparai bus stand has a ramp but no handrails. For people with mobility issues, climbing the ramp without handrails is very difficult.
No staff assistance available at Ariyamangalam bus stop. When I asked a conductor for help boarding, he ignored me completely.
Musiri bus stand has no elevator or ramp to the upper level waiting area. Disabled and elderly passengers are stuck on the ground floor.
KK Nagar bus stop pedestrian crossing has no audio signal. The traffic is very heavy and blind people cannot cross safely.
Crawford bus stop has broken pavement tiles creating trip hazards. My mother with a walking frame stumbled and fell here last week.
Trichy Junction railway station braille signs on platforms are worn out and unreadable. They need immediate replacement.
Thuvakudi bus stop has no bus shelter. During monsoon season, disabled passengers have no protection from heavy rain.
Bikshandarkoil bus stop road surface is completely broken. Wheelchair users cannot navigate the potholes to reach the bus stop.
MGR Bus Stand toilet for disabled is locked most of the time. Staff says they keep it locked to prevent misuse. This is discrimination.
Palakkarai bus stop has no audio system. Buses come and go silently. Blind passengers cannot tell which bus has stopped.
Thillai Nagar bus stop at night has zero lighting. Disabled passengers are at risk of accidents. No reflective markers either.
The Teppakulam bus stop has high kerb with no drop kerb for wheelchairs. I have to go 200 meters to find a place to get on the road.
Khajamalai bus stop staff are not trained in disability awareness. When I asked for help, they looked confused and didn't know what to do.
Chennai New Bus Stand has no accessible toilet. Disabled passengers have no facilities available.
Staff at Chennai Central Bus Stand are not trained to assist disabled passengers. No help available.
No tactile path or braille signage at Chennai Central Bus Stand. Visually impaired people are completely ignored.
The bus shelter at Chennai Town Bus Stop has no seating for elderly or disabled passengers.
No wheelchair ramp at Coimbatore Town Bus Stop. Disabled passengers cannot board buses safely.
No audio announcement system at Coimbatore New Bus Stand. Blind passengers miss their buses regularly.
Broken pavement near Coimbatore New Bus Stand makes wheelchair access impossible.
